title: assonia tomentosa
intro: Assonia tomentosa, also known as the velvet tree or Assonia, is a flowering plant species in the family Malpighiaceae. The plant has been used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, making it useful in treating various health issues. The health benefits of Assonia tomentosa include its potential to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory problems, and soothe digestive issues. The herbal preparations of the plant include infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties and reap its health benefits.
